steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes the plover and crocodile as having a symbiotic relationship where each gains a benefit.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Reciprocal means each party gives and receives, matching the mutual benefit described.
The other three either imply one‑sided advantage, lack of benefit, or unrelated meaning.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
